pains.title: Legacy concierge models are expensive and full of blind spots
pains.subtitle: Manual spreadsheets, unpredictable shifts and high turnover turn the lobby into a budget black hole. Meanwhile, visitors without validation and weak triage expose residents and assets.

costs.title: Payroll that drains up to 70% of the condo budget
costs.description: Extra shifts, labor charges and night work increase monthly fees with no clear ROI. OKTAFORCE automates procedures and reallocates resources to innovation.

humanError.title: Human errors and front-desk surrender
humanError.description: Unstructured approaches and daily pressure create openings for intrusions or quick robberies. Our protocols are orchestrated by AI and certified operators.

lackVisibility.title: No data to support decisions
lackVisibility.description: Reports arrive late and in different formats. The OKTAFORCE dashboard delivers real-time indicators, audit trails and alerts for every incident.

compliance.title: LGPD and privacy risks
compliance.description: Visitor data gets scattered across spreadsheets and non-certified apps. We store everything in encrypted cloud infrastructure with custom retention policies.

staffing.title: Unpredictable staffing and coverage gaps
staffing.description: Shift swaps and absenteeism leave the property exposed. We run redundant command centers with certified operators and 24/7 protocols.

benefits.title: Immediate impact for property managers, boards and residents
benefits.subtitle: Designed for sophisticated communities that demand numbers, transparency and proof.

savings.title: Measurable savings
savings.description: Reduce fixed costs, overtime and labor liabilities with a remote command center that scales with your property.

security.title: AI-driven proactive security
security.description: Intelligent recognition of faces, plates and suspicious patterns with coordinated response between operators and tactical partners.

experience.title: Frictionless resident experience
experience.description: Resident app for pre-approved visitors, temporary QR codes, smart kiosks and multichannel communication.

transparency.title: Radical transparency and governance
transparency.description: Dashboards, recordings, SLA reports and audit logs ready for meetings, committees and compliance reviews.

intelligence.title: OKTAFORCE proprietary AI runs in three layers
intelligence.subtitle: We merge sensors, video analytics and historical data to prevent incidents before they escalate.

sense.title: Continuous sensing
sense.description: Integrates cameras, access control, LPR and IoT devices to capture events in milliseconds.

predict.title: Risk prediction
predict.description: Models trained with hundreds of thousands of occurrences detect anomalies and trigger protocols automatically.

act.title: Coordinated action
act.description: Certified operators validate AI alerts, interact with visitors and dispatch support partners within seconds.

differentials.title: Robust infrastructure, specialized people and trustworthy data

redundancy.title: N+2 resilient infrastructure
redundancy.description: Mirrored data centers in Brazil and abroad, dedicated links and automatic failover under 3 seconds.

lgpd.title: Compliance and LGPD applied
lgpd.description: Processes reviewed by legal partners, encrypted storage and exhaustive logs for audits.

dashboard.title: Executive dashboard and predictive reports
dashboard.description: SLA indicators, incident heatmap, unit ranking and one-click PDF or CSV export.

service.title: Premium support 24/7
service.description: Dedicated customer success per property, monthly on-site visits and a communication plan with the board.

testimonials.title: Customers who already operate with OKTAFORCE

items.quote: We reduced concierge costs by 62% in the first quarter without losing residents' confidence. Board meetings are faster because we present clear metrics.
items.name: Professional condo manager - gated community in Alphaville

items.quote: Integration with our access control and resident app eliminated queues. The OKTAFORCE team anticipates maintenance and keeps the board in the loop.
items.name: Facility manager - corporate complex on Faria Lima

items.quote: LGPD compliance was a major concern. Now every interaction is registered with secure retention for audits when needed.
items.name: Mixed-use condo board in Rio de Janeiro

items.question: How long does implementation take?
items.answer: After the assessment we deliver the rollout plan within 10 days. Activation happens between 30 and 45 days depending on the current infrastructure.

items.question: Do you integrate with existing systems?
items.answer: Our technical squad connects the OKTAFORCE hub to access control, CCTV and condo ERPs using APIs or approved connectors.

items.question: Can we keep an on-site concierge?
items.answer: When needed we activate a hybrid model with on-site agents during peak hours or works while the remote center remains the decision core.

items.question: Can I monitor KPIs in real time?
items.answer: Yes. The dashboard shows SLA, incident breakdown, audit trails and recordings. You can configure alerts by email or WhatsApp.

meta.title: About us - OKTAFORCE
meta.description: Learn about OKTAFORCE, our mission, vision and values to reinvent remote concierge with artificial intelligence in Brazil.
meta.keywords: oktaforce, about us, mission, vision, values, remote concierge

hero.title: Global DNA, operation fully dedicated to Brazil
hero.subtitle: We combine international investment, proprietary technology and a local team that truly understands Brazilian condominiums.

story.title: Built to raise the security standard
paragraphs: OKTAFORCE was founded in 2021 by specialists in electronic security, data science and property management who were leading projects in North America and Brazil.

We identified a common pattern: sophisticated condominiums wanted to cut expenses without losing a strong sense of protection. The market was crowded with promises but lacked transparency. We decided to create a platform that merges proprietary AI, human-centric protocols and radical governance.

In 2023 we established our operations center in São Paulo with a Brazilian team, N+2 redundancy and strategic partnerships with security and technology firms. Since then we have grown alongside professional condo managers, administrators and investment groups that demand data, SLA and long-term partnership.

missionVision.mission: Deliver intelligent, sustainable and transparent security for condominiums ready to evolve beyond the traditional concierge model.
missionVision.vision: Become the benchmark for remote concierge and proactive risk management in Latin America by combining AI, specialized operations and seamless resident experience.

values.title: Continuous innovation
values.description: We evolve constantly, applying technology and practical intelligence to unlock better outcomes.

values.title: Trust and transparency
values.description: Every relationship is guided by ethics, clarity and accessible data for boards and residents.

values.title: Service excellence
values.description: Quality is present in every detail, from incident handling to 24/7 monitoring.

values.title: Agility and efficiency
values.description: Agile playbooks tailored to each property ensure the right response at the right time.

values.title: People first
values.description: We recognise collaborators, residents and partners as essential parts of our ecosystem.

values.title: Sustainability and future
values.description: We operate responsibly, respecting resources, communities and local regulations.

values.title: Security as a priority
values.description: We protect people, assets and data with proprietary technology and full redundancy.

values.title: Long-term partnership
values.description: We build lasting relationships with clear goals, measurable ROI and shared governance.

sections.title: Remote concierge powered by AI
sections.headline: 24/7 operations with dual validation and smart playbooks
sections.description: Our N+2 command center validates every access through facial recognition, biometrics and the resident app. Certified operators and proprietary AI work together to remove blind spots and keep the community safe.
bullets: Smart authorisation with biometrics, facial recognition and resident app workflows.
Centralised triage with dual validation (AI + certified operator).
Complete audio, video and event logs available for real-time audits.

sections.title: OKTAVISION
sections.headline: Computer vision that anticipates incidents
sections.description: The platform analyses cameras and sensors in milliseconds, detects unusual behaviour and triggers coordinated response protocols before risks escalate.
bullets: Real-time detection of loitering, perimeter breaches and unusual routes.
Automated alerts that start playbooks and dispatch tactical teams.
Dashboard with heatmaps, risk reports and full decision trail.

sections.title: Smart Locker & Smart Drop
sections.headline: Smart deliveries for every condominium profile
sections.description: From modular lockers to discreet built-in compartments, we deliver full control over parcels with automatic notifications and digital tracking integrated with the OKTAFORCE app.
bullets: Modular Smart Locker with multiple sizes and digital tracking.
Customisable Smart Drop for gates and compact lobbies.
Integration with the OKTAFORCE app, notifications and delivery audit trail.

hero.title: Six ways to bring your property into the new security era
hero.description: Blend Smart View — our proprietary AI — with trained operators and redundant infrastructure. Choose a ready-to-run configuration or customise modules for your operations team.
hero.caption: Limited slots for live demos

metrics.label: average response time on priority calls

plans.title: Find the plan that fits your property
plans.subtitle: Every plan includes Smart View, N+2 redundancy and 24/7 support. OKTAFORCE fine-tunes sensors, integrations and protocols to match your governance.
plans.disclaimer: Monthly prices refer to the indicated number of units. Larger footprints receive a customised feasibility study.

list.name: Essência Plan
list.headline: Autonomy and security in the residents' hands
list.audience: Built for properties starting their remote concierge journey with full control.
list.priceNote: Covers up to 120 units. Ask our team for projects beyond this volume.
list.description: Residents release access through the OKTAFORCE app while monitoring video and audio in real time, cutting costs without sacrificing protection.
features: Facial recognition, biometrics and mobile keys for access control.
Dedicated intercoms fully integrated with the resident app.
FHD cameras with redundant recording at our data centre for 15 days.
Complete app for visitor approval, parcel management and shared areas.
Preventive monitoring and 24/7 technical support from the OKTAFORCE team.
Supports up to 4 pedestrian doors and 2 vehicle gates (expansions evaluated on demand).
Fire system integration with automatic release on emergency routes.
Individual UPS for every gate plus mini-UPS on external access points.
list.note: Additional doors and modules can be contracted as add-ons.

list.name: Impacto Plan
list.headline: Professional remote concierge with centralised triage
list.audience: Ideal for properties that prefer OKTAFORCE operators validating every access.
list.priceNote: Covers up to 80 units. Larger operations receive a tailored proposal.
list.description: Visitors contact our command centre. The team validates ID, voice and video recordings before granting access according to shared protocols.
features: Humanised remote service provided by dedicated operators.
Centralised triage with recorded video and audio validation.
AI workflow automation to prioritise events and keep audit records.
Technical support SLA of up to 1h30 for critical risks.
Hardware replacement without extra cost during the contract term.
All features from the Essência Plan.

list.name: Supremo Plan
list.headline: Dual validation and full audit trail on every access
list.audience: Chosen by properties that demand the highest level of protection and traceability.
list.priceNote: Covers up to 80 units. Above this, our engineering team delivers a feasibility study.
list.description: Adds dual vehicle validation and ground-floor automation. Every event is supervised by AI, redundant recordings and detailed audit dashboards.
features: Dual vehicle validation with inner gate or elevator management.
Automated closing of ground-floor blocks after each access.
Smart Drop unit for secure parcel delivery.
Perimeter monitoring with active infrared sensors and electric fences.
Dashboards and audit trail for every approved access.
All features from the Impacto Plan.

list.name: Elite Plan
list.headline: AI elevating the everyday experience
list.audience: For premium developments seeking the ultimate in automation and data.
list.priceNote: Covers up to 80 units. Premium properties receive custom modules and onboarding.
list.description: Introduces Smart Locker, OktaVision analytics and proactive routines that enhance resident convenience and governance.
features: Smart Locker with multiple compartments and digital tracking.
OktaVision monitoring pole with analytics cameras and proprietary AI.
Integration with postal services and carriers for delivery logistics.
Management dashboard with full visibility over accesses and events.
Automated virtual patrols and proactive alerts.
All features from the Supremo Plan.

list.name: Absoluto Plan
list.headline: Cutting-edge automation with on-site team reinforcement
list.audience: Designed for properties that need part-time physical staff alongside automation.
list.priceNote: Covers up to 194 units. Ask for a custom roadmap for larger footprints.
list.description: Blends remote operators with an on-site team to support critical hours, special events and high-traffic routines without losing efficiency.
features: Two on-site collaborators allocated by the OKTAFORCE team.
6x1 shifts (44h/week) or 12x36 daily 12-hour shifts.
Local support during peak demand or contingency periods.
OktaVision and smart monitoring fully integrated with the on-site crew.
Incident response playbooks with consultative support.
All features from the Supremo Plan.

list.name: Presença Plan
list.headline: Physical concierge powered by remote intelligence
list.audience: For developments that want full-time staff supported by OKTAFORCE technology.
list.priceNote: Covers up to 240 units. Custom engineering is available for very large sites.
list.description: Delivers a 100% on-site concierge team supervised by OKTAFORCE plus smart systems and remote monitoring for complete situational awareness.
features: Concierge staff allocated 100% on site under OKTAFORCE supervision.
12x36 shifts with 24/7 availability and operational redundancy.
Direct service to residents, visitors and suppliers supported by smart tools.
Physical access control fully integrated with intelligent systems.
Complementary remote monitoring with data centre recording.
Integrated management via app and administrative dashboard.
All features from the Absoluto Plan.

items.title: Smart View in real time

items.title: Human specialists
items.description: Certified Brazilian operators with a 5-second SLA on 78% of calls and 24/7 technical coverage.
